case_title: DRIVETIME, INC. VS. EVOLV AGENCY, LLC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NIKO VOORI, FOUNDER AND CEO. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRIVETIME, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRIVETIME, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EVOLV AGENCY, LLC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT EVOLV AGENCY, LLC.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DRIVETIME, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-05-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EVOLV AGENCY, LLC.
(SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS; [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DRIVETIME, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EVOLV AGENCY, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DRIVETIME, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVOLV AGENCY, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRIVETIME, INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRIVETIME, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EVOLV AGENCY, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRIVETIME, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVOLV AGENCY, LLC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT EVOLV AGENCY, LLC.
